objective: Prove the harness can close a clean run that touches a real backend product file while the runner authors completion evidence in manifest.json.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Close one clean harness run whose touched paths include the current run directory and apps/backend/build.gradle.kts.
Apply one behavior-preserving clarification comment to apps/backend/build.gradle.kts after gate-generator.
out_of_scope: Do not change any backend runtime behavior, dependency versions, or compiler targets.
Do not touch any additional apps/backend files beyond apps/backend/build.gradle.kts.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The run closes through freeze-contract, gate-generator, and gate-close, and manifest.json records completion state authored by the runner.
The touched backend product file changes only via a non-functional clarification comment about the Java 25 toolchain and Kotlin JVM 23 bytecode target mismatch.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
